sections.paragraph:
const. מָחֳרַת f.-

(1) the morrow, יֹום הַמָּחֳרָת to-morrow, Num 11:32 hence-

(2) without יֹום id. to-morrow (subst.), (le lendewain). לַמָּחֳרָת (comp. לְמָחָר) Jon 4:7 מִמָּחֳרָת the next day, the day after, Gen 19:34 Exo 9:6. עַד־מִמָּחֳרָת until the next day (comp. מִן No. 3). Lev 23:16. Followed by a gen. מָחֳרַת הַיֹּום הַהוּא the morrow of that day, 1Ch 29:21 Lev 23:11, 15 Lev 23:15, 16 Lev 23:16. מִמָּחֳרַת הַשַּׁבָּת the day after the sabbath, Num 33:3 1Sa 20:27.-מָחֳרָתָם 1Sa 30:17, perhaps adv., like יֹומָם. [This termination ־ָם is taken in Thes. as a pleonastic suffix.]
